_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement).

title: Department OF Defense (Dod) TEST Method Standard Documents
summary: This DID contains format and content instructions for DoD Test Method Standards and their associated documents, which specify military unique design or functional criteria for systems, subsystems, equipment, assemblies, components, items, or parts.
use_relationship:
A DoD Test Method Standard will be used to specify military unique design or functional criteria that must be adhered to in the development of systems, subsystems, equipment, assemblies, components, items, or parts.
This Data Item Description (DID) contains the format and content preparation instructions for DoD Test Method Standards and their associated documents that are described in the following paragraphs of MIL-STD-962. Only those documents listed below will be required when specified individually on contract.
a. DoD Test Method Standard – Paragraphs 4.1 through 5.15.
b. DoD Test Method Standard Revision – Paragraph 5.17.
c. DoD Test Method Standard Change – Paragraphs 5.18 through 5.18.7.
d. DoD Test Method Standard Inactive for New Design Notice – Paragraph 5.19.2.
e. DoD Test Method Standard Cancellation Notice – Paragraph 5.19.3.
f. DoD Test Method Standard Reinstatement Notice – Paragraph 5.19.4.
g. DoD Test Method Standard Reactivation Notice – 5.19.5.
h. DoD Test Method Standard Administrative Notice – Paragraph 5.19.6.
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Reference Documents:
preparation_instructions.content: The applicable issue of the documents cited herein, including their approval dates and dates of any applicable notices and revisions, shall be as specified in the contract.

preparation_instructions.title: Format and Content:
preparation_instructions.content: Format and content for DoD Test Method Standards shall be as follows:

children.title: DoD Test Method Standard.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Test Method Standards shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraphs 4.1 through 5.15.

children.title: DoD Test Method Standard Revision:
children.content: Format and content of DoD Test Method Standard Revisions shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraph 5.17.

children.title: DoD Test Method Standard Changes.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Test Method Standard Changes shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraphs 5.18 through 5.18.7.

children.title: DoD Test Method Standard Inactive for New Design Notices.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Test Method Standard Inactive for New Design Notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraph 5.19.2.

children.title: DoD Test Method Standard Cancellation Notices.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Test Method Standard Cancellation Notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraph 5.19.3.

children.title: DoD Test Method Standard Reinstatement Notices.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Test Method Standard Reinstatement Notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraph 5.19.4.

children.title: DoD Test Method Standard Reactivation Notices.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Test Method Standard Reactivation Notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraph 5.19.5.

children.title: DoD Test Method Standard Administrative Notices.
children.content: Format and content of DoD Test Method Standard Administrative Notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraph 5.19.6.
